_description: Pre-verified source hints for source-discover skill. Feed these as known_sources to skip Tavily search for cities where we already know the platform. Generated from verify_city_sources.py research (March 2026).
_usage: For each city, pass the matching object as known_sources in the skill input. The skill will check these FIRST before doing Tavily search.

Apex, NC.notes: Municode requires ppid parameter — without it returns 500

Burlington, NC.notes: CivicPlus ArchiveCenter (NOT standard AgendaCenter — that is empty). Direct archive URL confirmed.

Clayton, NC.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter is empty, use CivicClerk

Durham, NC.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter has 199 PDFs but they are SCANNED IMAGES — only 65 chars extracted. Needs OCR.

Fayetteville, NC.notes: Legistar slug is cityoffayetteville NOT fayetteville

Greensboro, NC.notes: MIGRATED from Legistar (ends 2021-06) to eSCRIBE. Active portal: pub-greensboro-nc.escribemeetings.com (confirmed fresh via Collin's agent, 2026-03-30). Legistar slug 'greensboro' is dead — do not use.

Greenville, NC.notes: Granicus view_id=10 = City Council View (100 items, fresh Mar 2026). view_id=1 is stale (2022). CivicPlus AgendaCenter (greenvillenc.gov) is stale since Sept 2025 — only advisory/technical committees active there.

Hickory, NC.notes: Static HTML page at /agendas-and-minutes with PDF links (fresh Mar 17, 2026). CivicClerk portal (hickorync.portal.civicclerk.com) is DEAD — backend API (hickorync.api.civicclerk.com) returns 404, React app renders empty. Do NOT use CivicClerk.

Huntersville, NC.notes: Novus Agenda (EOL Sept 2025) — MUST check body for Application_Error (Novus returns 200 for any slug). Tavily found CivicClerk event URLs (huntersvillenc.portal.civicclerk.com) suggesting migration in progress. Test OData API: huntersvillenc.api.civicclerk.com/v1/Events/

Jacksonville, NC.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter (no parseable dates in HTML — needs deeper probe). WARNING: jaxcityc.legistar.com is Jacksonville, FLORIDA (Duval County) — NOT this city.

New Bern, NC.notes: Board of Aldermen (not 'City Council') meets here. Admin meeting agendas URL has PDFs. P&Z board at development_services/p_and_z_board_agendas_and_minutes.php is a different body — ignore it. CivicPlus AgendaCenter returns 404.

Rocky Mount, NC.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter City Council category (id=5) is STALE — last updated 2024-12-09. Use /497/Council-Agendas-Minutes instead (current through March 2026, has PDFs). AgendaCenter overall looks fresh but that is from other committees.

Salisbury, NC.notes: City Council agendas listing page at /Government/City-Council/Minutes-and-Agendas (fresh 2026-04-07). Tavily returns a specific 2022 packet URL that falsely parses a future date — ignore single packet URLs. CivicPlus AgendaCenter returns 404.

Canal Winchester, OH.notes: DOMAIN CORRECTED from canalwinchesteroh.gov. CivicPlus V4 verified.

Cuyahoga Falls, OH.notes: Drupal CMS with filterable files page. Direct PDF links.

Delaware, OH.notes: PLATFORM UNKNOWN — needs manual investigation or Playwright. Granicus portal (delawareohio.granicus.com) only has 1 view 'Main View' with 2 items from 2021-07-15 — city has migrated off Granicus. City website (delawareohio.net) returns 403 on all agenda paths from automated fetchers. WARNING: Tavily returns co.delaware.oh.us (Delaware County) — wrong entity. Requires Playwright or human lookup to find current agenda platform.

Euclid, OH.notes: Custom Drupal CMS at /minutes/agendas (175KB, fresh 2026-03, but dates embedded in JS calendar — may need Playwright for exact meeting dates). NOT on CivicClerk — portal.civicclerk.com returns generic shell for any subdomain (false positive).

Fairborn, OH.notes: MIGRATED from Granicus to Swagit (Granicus subsidiary) in March 2025. New system: fairbornoh.new.swagit.com/views/838/ — returns dates directly from httpx (Mar 16, 2026 most recent). Old Granicus URL fairborn.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=2 still accessible but only pre-March 2025 content.

Fairfield, OH.notes: MIGRATED to CivicClerk. OData API confirmed: fairfieldoh.api.civicclerk.com/v1/Events/ returns City Council meetings pre-scheduled through Dec 2026. CivicPlus AgendaCenter (fairfield-city.org) only has zoning/advisory boards — wrong category.

Hamilton, OH.notes: Squarespace site (hamilton-oh.gov/agendas-minutes) links to Google Drive folders for each year. 2026 City Council Agendas folder has files like "3-25-26 Online Agenda.pdf" (M-D-YY format with dashes). Playwright renders Google Drive folder listing with parseable dates. Update folder ID annually.

Lima, OH.notes: BoardDocs portal. CivicPlus domain DNS fails. Tavily found limaohio.gov/AgendaCenter — may have alternate CivicPlus.

Loveland, OH.notes: Uses Diligent Community platform for meeting management. Portal shows upcoming/recent meetings with dates like "Mar 24 2026" (Month DD YYYY format). CivicPlus AgendaCenter at oh-loveland.civicplus.com is empty/inactive.

Marysville, OH.notes: Archive Center at /archive.aspx has Board of Control Agendas, BZA, Planning Commission etc. with fresh 2026 dates (Mar 23, 2026 most recent). City Council agendas/minutes are on Municode (library.municode.com/oh/marysville/munidocs) — NOT the standard meeting portal. CivicPlus AgendaCenter is 404.

Mason, OH.notes: CivicClerk portal (tenant: mason-oh). BoardDocs at go.boarddocs.com/oh/mason is SCHOOL BOARD not city council — ignore it.

Medina, OH.notes: BoardDocs portal (POST API returns 404 — SPA only). Finance agendas at clerk-of-council URL have PDFs. WARNING: Tavily returned cityofmedinatn.org (Medina, Tennessee) — wrong city. WARNING: Tavily returns planning-zoning page — that is P&Z board, NOT city council.

Parma, OH.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter has PDFs but SCANNED IMAGES — only 140 chars extracted. Needs OCR.

Perrysburg, OH.notes: MIGRATED to CivicClerk. OData API confirmed fresh at perrysburgoh.api.civicclerk.com/v1/Events (2027-02-02 City Council). BoardDocs POST returns 404.

Powell, OH.notes: Granicus-powered page. Tavily confirmed granicus.com RSS feed.

Stow, OH.notes: DOMAIN CORRECTED: stow.oh.us (SSL cert error) redirects to stowohio.gov. CivicPlus AgendaCenter has active 2026 data for many boards. City Council stopped posting to CivicPlus after July 28, 2022 (other boards still active). The CivicPlus Search API URL returns full meeting list via Playwright (falls back to httpx parsing URL params). Update startDate/endDate annually for fresh classification.

Troy, OH.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter — V3 verified but Gemini LLM truncates JSON for this city's short agenda.

Warren, OH.notes: Revize CMS with downloadable agenda PDFs

Westerville, OH.notes: CivicClerk portal (tenant: westervilleoh). westerville.org returns 403 from Akamai CDN even to Playwright. WARNING: CivicClerk portal renders empty — backend API (westervilleoh.api.civicclerk.com) returns 404. Platform status UNKNOWN — may have migrated off CivicClerk. Requires manual investigation.

Beaumont, TX.notes: PrimeGov SPA portal. CivicPlus AgendaCenter is empty.

Belton, TX.notes: Server-rendered PHP page with agendas in a year-header table (2026 as section header above 'December 8', 'November 24' rows). extract_dates year-context pattern handles this. NOT on CivicClerk — beltontx.portal.civicclerk.com returns the generic 1110-byte CivicClerk shell (false positive from probe). WARNING: Tavily returned belton.org (Belton, MO) and beltonedc.org (Belton EDC) — both wrong entities.

Cleburne, TX.notes: Migrated from CivicPlus to Diligent Community (May 2025). CivicPlus has 2012-2025 data. Tavily found old CivicPlus URL.

Duncanville, TX.notes: CivicClerk OData API confirmed: duncanvilletx.api.civicclerk.com/v1/Events/ returns City Council Meeting 2027-03-02. WARNING: boardbook.org/public/Organization/858 is Duncanville ISD (school board) — NOT city council.

El Paso, TX.notes: Legistar API confirmed. WARNING: Tavily returned elpasoil.org (El Paso, Illinois) — wrong city.

Grand Prairie, TX.notes: Municode requires ppid parameter — without it returns 500. Embedded iframe on gptx.org.

Killeen, TX.notes: Legistar API confirmed (slug: killeen, not killeentexas). Most recent City Council: 2026-03-24. WARNING: boardbook.org/Public/Organization/1051 is Killeen ISD (school board) — NOT city council. CivicPlus AgendaCenter exists but Legistar is preferred (Tier 1).

Kyle, TX.notes: Classic Granicus, subdomain=cityofkyletx, view_id=3. NOT kyletx.new.swagit.com.

La Porte, TX.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter is STALE (last 2024). City agendas page at /778/Agendas-Minutes also stale. WARNING: Tavily returns laportecac.org (La Porte Industry Advisory Council) — wrong entity.

Lancaster, TX.notes: DestinyHosted iframe at lancaster-tx.com/1143/Agendas-and-Minutes. DestinyHosted URL fetches directly. CivicPlus AgendaCenter is EMPTY.

Midland, TX.notes: MIGRATED to CivicClerk. OData API confirmed: midlandtx.api.civicclerk.com/v1/Events/ returns City Council Regular Meetings (Dec 15 2026, Nov 17 2026). CivicPlus AgendaCenter (midlandtexas.gov) is STALE since 2020 for City Council — html_date_parse returned 2026-04-06 from a different committee category, not City Council. PrimeGov portal also exists at midland.primegov.com but CivicClerk is primary.

Palestine, TX.notes: Uses DestinyHosted (iframe at cityofpalestinetx.com/324/Meeting-Agendas-and-Minutes). DestinyHosted URL fetches directly — fresh Mar 2026. CivicPlus AgendaCenter shows only OLD advisory board PDFs (2019-2022). Do NOT use CivicPlus.

Sherman, TX.notes: CivicClerk portal (tenant: shermantx). CivicPlus AgendaCenter is empty. CivicClerk confirmed fresh via OData API.

Texarkana, TX.notes: DOMAIN CORRECTED from ci.texarkana.tx.us. CivicPlus has PDFs but SCANNED IMAGES. CivicClerk may have better data.

Tomball, TX.notes: Municode Meetings portal. CivicPlus AgendaCenter is empty.

Gibsonville, NC.notes: Custom Squarespace site — agendas at gibsonvillenc.org/agendas-minutes

Vermilion, OH.notes: Sitefinity CMS — agendas at cityofvermilionohio.gov council meetings section

Hartville, OH.notes: Custom CMS — council meetings at non-standard path /wba/content/meetings-and-news/council/

Sandy Oaks, TX.notes: WordPress site — city council at cityofsandyoaks.com/city-council/

Stallings, NC.notes: BoardDocs at go.boarddocs.com/nc/stallings — slug may be wrong, verify

Pembroke, NC.notes: BoardDocs at go.boarddocs.com/nc/pembroke — slug may be wrong, verify

Pittsboro, NC.notes: BoardDocs at go.boarddocs.com/nc/pittsboro — slug may be wrong, verify

Canal Fulton, OH.notes: Custom CMS with meetings page — has upcoming and recent council meetings

Clearcreek Township, OH.notes: Agendas on /trustee-meetings/ — NOT the /calendar-events/ page which has no PDFs attached

Etna Township, OH.notes: Custom site — calendar page has trustee meeting agendas. Diligent portal also exists but calendar is the right entry point.

Rootstown Township, OH.notes: Portage County township — trustee minutes at rootstowntwp.com/trusteeminutes/

Elm City, NC.notes: Small town in Wilson County NC

Refugio, TX.notes: City of Refugio — may use county site for notices
